case_title: GUEVARA JORGE VS C.E.A. TRAVEL AGENCY et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO MARIO ALVARENGA RETURNED SIGNED.
CERTIFIED MAIL TO C.E.A TRAVEL AGENCY RETURNED SIG NED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUEVARA JORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT C.E.A. TRAVEL AGENCY $1,037.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,057.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY GUEVARA JORGE AS TO DEFENDANT C.E.A. TRAVEL AGENCY ALVARENGA MARIO (OFFICE MANAGER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
